title: feat(Quadlet): Added Root= key
body:
## Description

This PR adds the `Root=` key to quadlets, which maps to the [podman --root option](https://docs.podman.io/en/stable/markdown/podman.1.html#root-value) thus providing support to specify the storage directory of images etc. Having the `Root=` option would allow podman users to define multiple, isolated container environments and/or define a custom location for storage via Quadlet.

---

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
Add Root= in quadlet to support podman --root
```

The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Personally I am not sure we should expose Root/Runroot/Tmpdir as first class options at all, you already can set GlobalArgs if needed. Using these options correctly is not so trivial so I am not sure we should expose them even more. For quadlet it introduces a new problem, if someone specifies a volume without Root= but then a container with Root= while trying to use that volume unit qualdet will generate the units but they fail at runtime as podman would not find the volume.

Fair point. I agree that `Root=` in quadlets would provide an easy way to shoot yourself in the foot and my use case of multiple isolated container environment is also an edge case, I think. When searching for a way to achieve this I have to admit that I missed the [GlobalArgs=](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html#globalargs). So from my point of view this PR adding `Run=` (and others keys such as `RunRoot=` or `StorageOpt=` in follow-ups) is obsolete - sorry for the unnecessary noise.
